series_metadata.series_description: A permit issued by the Director of Ohio EPA or its designee, including Air and Surface Water Permits to Install, Air Permits to Install and Operate, Air Title IV and Title V Permits, Construction Demolition and Debris Landfill Permits, Landfill Permits to Install, and any supporting materials issued to implement the requirements of environmental regulations, such as Engineer Guides.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanent. ; Paper: Permanent unless scanned
